sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 63

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 63:1
items.html: (to the question) For she has equivalence with the new AHP [Awzen, Hotem, Peh] of ZA [Zeir Anpin], which are his NHY [Netzah, Hod, Yesod] of Gadlut, from the time they were fallen in BYA [Beria, Yetzira, Assiya], and afterwards at the time of the Zivug [coupling] in the upper-upper, in the secret of the Kli and Rucha Kadma'a [first vessel and first spirit]. Therefore she cleaves to them as long as she does not have the completeness of the ten Sefirot of Kelim on her own; and when her Kelim are completed, she parts from there.
